rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue and Trump's comments put the Iran deal at risk — both affect energy price outlook indirectly for Poland, but no qualitative new change beyond prior baseline. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km; Beirut strikes continue
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli military operations in Lebanon and broader region continue without qualitative escalation for Poland. Indirect energy price risk remains but no new spike confirmed.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's rhetoric signals friction over Iran deal progress, which could affect energy prices indirectly for Poland. Still rhetoric only — no confirmed policy change.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A significant bilateral trade deal between UK and Japan with limited direct relevance to Poland's daily life or EU economy.
